name: Chelsea Clinton
subject: Re: The deadline tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
Mom's counting on you. | Friend --

My mom has always been able to count on you, especially during the big moments.

That's why we’re asking for your help now.

Tonight we're facing our biggest quarterly FEC fundraising deadline yet -- and the last one before voters start heading to the polls!

**Can you chip in $1 to help hit our fundraising goal and make sure we're ready to win in Iowa and New Hampshire?**
| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQzNjc4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDEzMjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQzNjc4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDEzMjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you!

Chelsea

**OFFICIAL 2015 SUPPORTER RECORD**

**EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**STATUS:** Team Hillary member (thank you!)
[**SUGGESTED END OF YEAR CONTRIBUTION:** $1](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQzNjc4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDEzMjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQzNjc4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDEzMjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjQzNjc4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDEzMjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQzNjc4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDEzMjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQzNjc4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDEzMjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQzNjc4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDEzMjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjQzNjc4NzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDEzMjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

name: Jeff Weaver, Bernie 2016
subject: Why we ask
body:
#
Friends -
Time is running out, so I need to take a moment to share with you why these emails are so important to our campaign.
Yesterday afternoon we learned that Hillary Clinton has most likely raised well over $100 million since she started her campaign. You've probably seen the articles about their high-powered fundraising events with the country's financial elite that sometimes pull in millions of dollars in a single night!
But you know Bernie. He does not go around asking millionaires and billionaires for money at those kind of events -- it is emails like this that fund our campaign. So when you see our poll numbers rise and the size of our organization continuously grow, it is these requests that make that result possible.
The clock is ticking, and I have to ask once more before midnight:
[**Chip in $3 before our midnight FEC fundraising deadline to show your love for Bernie and say you have had ENOUGH of the billionaire class buying our elections.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb28cb/43f17890/49cd3e52/620d52c5/3742511948/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-campaign?refcode=em151231last-call")
The strength of our political revolution is not about how much money we raise, it's about how many contributions our supporters have made to power this movement.
Thank you for adding yours before midnight.
All of my best,
Jeff Weaver
Bernie 2016
[Contribute $3](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb28cb/43f17890/49cd3e52/620d52c5/3742511948/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-campaign?refcode=em151231last-call")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb28cb/43f17890/49cd3e52/620d52c2/3742511948/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb28cb/43f17890/49cd3e52/620d52c3/3742511948/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb28cb/43f17890/49cd3e52/620d52c0/3742511948/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb28cb/43f17890/49cd3e52/620d52c1/3742511948/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Are you ready?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
My last question for you in 2015: | Friend --

I will never forget the people who stood with me at the beginning of this campaign.

**This is the last time I’ll ask in 2015: If you’re here and ready to win, chip in $1 before midnight:**
| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQzNjgyNDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDIzNzgyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQzNjgyNDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDIzNzgyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you and happy new year,

Hillary

**OFFICIAL 2015 SUPPORTER RECORD**

**EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**STATUS:** Team Hillary member (thank you!)
[**SUGGESTED END OF YEAR CONTRIBUTION:** $1](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQzNjgyNDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDIzNzgyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQzNjgyNDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDIzNzgyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQzNjgyNDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDIzNzgyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjQzNjgyNDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDIzNzgyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQzNjgyNDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDIzNzgyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQzNjgyNDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDIzNzgyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQzNjgyNDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDIzNzgyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjQzNjgyNDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDIzNzgyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQzNjgyNDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDIzNzgyS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQzNjgyNDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDIzNzgyS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQzNjgyNDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDIzNzgyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Did you see this?

Dear Friend,

Happy New Year!

I wanted to send a
quick note of appreciation for your dedicated support of the
campaign over the past year, especially in the lead up to
yesterday's critical fundraising deadline.

Heidi and I are so
thankful as we head into the final month before the Iowa Caucus
and the states beyond that you are on our side. It is because of
courageous conservatives like you that we are on the road to
victory.

2016 is now upon us,
together we will reignite the promise of America!

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz

PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

www.tedcruz.org

Copyright © 2015 All Rights
Reserved | Privacy Policy

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system October 8, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWDqyZMyNM

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWDqyZMyNM

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-31532375107-echo3-FB45557D9718D5A989E65056022839D9@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

Heidi and I are so thankful as we head into the final month before the Iowa Caucus and the states beyond that you are on our side. It is because of courageous conservatives like you that we are on the road to victory. 2016 is now upon us, together we will reignite the promise of America! name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep=2E_Tony_C=C3=A1rdenas?=
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY **BOLDPAC** AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
---
Dear Friends,

I'm so proud of everything we've achieved together in 2015. Because of your generous support, we finished off the year by hitting our fundraising goals and are prepared to look forward, with still more eager anticipation, to the work we have ahead.

This year, we'll elect a new President, a new Senate, and a new Congress. 2016 is a chance for Democrats across the country to start fresh and to renew our promise to move this country forward -- no matter the challenges.

My friends, I won't understate obstacles ahead of us. From the seemingly endless stream of corporate campaign cash tarnishing our Democratic process, to the constant assault on progressive priorities in Congress, we certainly have our work cut out for us.

**Our campaign strategy is informed by the feedback of supporters like you.[Please take a minute and fill out our BOLD Election Survey to help guide us into 2016 >>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea71b/e60883a/71fdd1f4/14426caf/3592126750/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/election-survey?source=MS_EM_TY_2016.01.01_B1_TY_X__F1_S1_C1__all&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")**

As I think about the coming year, I'm reminded of everything we've already accomplished: Last year we raised more online _than ever before_ , and thousands of dedicated Democrats have joined together to stand up for our values. I know that together, we can accomplish anything.

I'm so grateful for your support, and for the privilege of working alongside you to move our nation forward.

All the best,

Tony

Congressman Tony Cardenas
CHC BOLD PAC Chairman

| |

220 I St. NE, Suite 280
Washington, DC 20002

| PAID FOR BY **BOLDPAC** AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
---

This message was sent to: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea71b/e60883a/71fdd1f4/14426cac/3592126750/VEsE/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/update-your-information")** | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea71b/e60883a/71fdd1f4/14426cac/3592126750/VEsF/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/update-your-information").

CHC Bold PAC is the voice for Latinos in American politics. We are committed to representing the values of the Latino community and increasing the diversity of our leadership in the House and Senate.

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. If we're going to elect candidates passionate about issues that impact the Latino community, we need you with us every step of the way.

If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [click here](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea71b/e60883a/71fdd1f4/14426cad/3592126750/VEsC/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea71b/e60883a/71fdd1f4/14426cad/3592126750/VEsD/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/less-emails") If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts to elect diverse Democrats, please [click here](http://go.boldpac. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/boldpacq32015?refcode=footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=").

_From the entire BOLD PAC team, thanks for your support!_

**[DONATE>>](http://go.boldpac. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/boldpacq32015?refcode=footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
---

name: Robby Mook, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Happy election year!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
What your support made possible | Friend --

Happy election year! First things first: Thank you.

Because of the support of hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors, we had an incredible year. Our campaign raised a historic $112 million in 2015 -- and 94 percent of donations to this campaign in our last quarter were in increments of $100 or less.

**That's amazing. I am so proud of what we're building together.**

But we can't get complacent. With exactly one month to go until the Iowa caucuses, our opponent has the resources to keep this close.

We have to win. Hillary can take on whatever Republican they throw at us -- but she only gets to do that if she's the Democratic nominee.

So we're going to keep our heads down and stay on task. (Volunteers are knocking doors and making calls in Iowa and New Hampshire right this very minute!)

One month from today, if we win the Iowa caucuses, we're going to make history -- and Hillary won't forget the people who were with her in the beginning. That's you. Thanks again.

Now back to work!

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

P.S. -- If you're a numbers geek like I am, you'll enjoy some of the other stats and fun facts from our year-in-review blog post. **[Check it out!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQzNzE2MzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDk4NTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

\-----
The first votes will be cast in the primary in just a few weeks -- chip in $1 now to make sure Hillary wins.
| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQzNzE2MzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDk4NTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQzNzE2MzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDk4NTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQzNzE2MzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDk4NTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQzNzE2MzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDk4NTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQzNzE2MzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIwMDk4NTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0).
